extracted.title: Construction and Maintenance Schedule Posting
extracted.description:
As a courtesy, Columbia Gulf Transmission, LLC (CGT) hereby notifies customers the Construction and Maintenance Schedule posted under "Construction and Maintenance" on the Informational Postings website has been updated. CGT reminds customers to please check the Maintenance Schedule on a regular basis.

The current schedule has been updated to reflect maintenance activity on the following:

* Holcomb Compressor Station Unit 2702 Maintenance – May 19, 2026
* Inverness Compressor Station Maintenance – May 20-22, 2026

Additionally, the following file(s) can be located on Informational Postings under Construction and Maintenance
CGT Construction and Maintenance Schedule 04-20-2026.pdf
